headline: Paramount Plus is two dollars for two months of ad-free viewing
summary: Get two months of Paramount Plus for just 99 cents per month until June 25th, 2026. This limited-time offer applies to both new and former subscribers. Premium and Essential plans renew at regular prices after the promotional period.

headline: In a big year for horror, Widow’s Bay still stands apart
summary: Horror is thriving in 2026 with new films, established directors, and relevant franchises. Widow's Bay distinguishes itself amidst a strong year for the genre. It offers a unique take compared to other popular horror titles like Backrooms and 28 Years Later.

headline: The best early Amazon Prime Day deals so far
summary: Amazon Prime Day begins June 23rd, but early deals are already available. Find AirPods Pro 3 at their lowest price ever. Save $60 on Ring's latest battery-powered doorbell.

headline: How to find the best deals during Amazon’s Prime Day sale
summary: Amazon's Prime Day 2026 runs from June 23rd to June 27th. Prime members can access major discounts on Amazon devices and other products. Learn strategies to maximize your savings during this huge shopping event.

headline: End of Abyss Preview: A Twin-Stick, Tough-as-Nails Metroidvania That’s Creepy as Hell
summary: End of Abyss promises a challenging, no-holds-barred metroidvania experience. Set in a disturbing facility, it features twin-stick shooter mechanics. Despite a crowded release schedule, it offers a rich world and tough tasks for players.

headline: Warframe Creative Director Says New Characters Were Inspired by Super Smash Bros.
summary: Warframe's Rebecca Ford reveals Super Smash Bros. inspired new 2-in-1 characters. These unique additions are part of the upcoming Jade Shadows update. Get an exclusive look at Ryuko’s Railjack.

headline: Mike Myers Says Austin Powers 4 Will Happen
summary: Mike Myers confirms plans for a fourth Austin Powers movie. The creator states the beloved spy will return. Fans can anticipate the revival of the iconic comedy franchise.

headline: Rockstar Dishes Out Free GTA 5 Current-Gen Upgrades to PS4 and Xbox One Owners
summary: Digital owners of Grand Theft Auto V on PS4 or Xbox One get a free current-gen upgrade. This allows players to experience the enhanced versions on newer consoles. Rockstar delivers a welcome bonus for existing fans.

headline: Iran sends tankers loaded with oil past US military blockade
summary: Three Iranian oil tankers successfully passed the US blockade in the Gulf of Oman. Ship-tracking data confirms the vessels crossed the designated line. This move signifies a direct challenge to US military presence.

headline: PM warns Burnham against immediate leadership challenge if he wins by-election
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer advises Andy Burnham against an immediate Labour leadership challenge. Starmer suggests focusing on the subsequent Manchester mayoral race. This follows speculation if Burnham wins the Makerfield by-election.

headline: Baby blue tracksuits and no ties - what England's off-pitch looks say about the team
summary: England men's team showcases a new 'off-duty' fashion style featuring baby blue tracksuits and no ties. Experts analyze the sartorial choices ahead of their first World Cup match. The looks convey a relaxed and modern team image.

headline: BBC announces 550 job cuts as first part of £500m savings plan
summary: The BBC plans to cut 550 jobs as part of a major £500m savings initiative. Initial proposals include 200 job losses within the news division. This move aims to streamline operations and reduce overall costs.
